requirement_topic.en: ICTA Radio Type Approval — Azerbaijan Telecom and Radio Terminal Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: ICTA无线电型号核准——阿塞拜疆电信及无线电终端设备
requirement_topic.zht: ICTA無線電型號核准——亞塞拜然電信及無線電終端設備

summary.en: All radio and telecommunications terminal equipment placed on the Azerbaijan market must obtain type approval and a conformity certificate or registration from ICTA (Information and Communications Technologies Agency of Azerbaijan — Azərbaycan Respublikasının İnformasiya Texnologiyaları Agentliyi, also known as AZINFOCOM). ICTA is the national telecommunications regulatory authority operating under the Law on Telecommunications of the Republic of Azerbaijan (2005, as amended). ICTA type approval is a mandatory Azerbaijan-specific requirement that is entirely separate from EAEU EAC conformity marking — Azerbaijan is not a member of the EAEU and does not recognise EAC certificates as substitutes. The scope covers all radio-frequency transmitting and receiving devices including Wi-Fi (2.4 GHz and 5 GHz), Bluetooth, Zigbee, Z-Wave, cellular (2G/3G/4G/5G), and IoT radio modules. Applicants must submit technical documentation, test reports from recognised laboratories, and a declaration or application for conformity assessment. Approved devices receive an ICTA registration number or certificate. Products must obtain ICTA approval before being imported and placed on the Azerbaijan market. CCC, CE, and FCC approvals are not recognised by ICTA and do not substitute for Azerbaijan type approval.
summary.zh: 所有投放阿塞拜疆市场的无线电及电信终端设备，均须取得ICTA（阿塞拜疆信息和通信技术署，亦称AZINFOCOM）的型号核准及合格证书或注册。ICTA是依据《阿塞拜疆共和国电信法》（2005年，经修订）运作的国家电信监管机构。ICTA型号核准是阿塞拜疆特有的强制要求，与EAEU EAC合格标志完全独立——阿塞拜疆不是EAEU成员国，不承认EAC证书可替代本国核准。适用范围涵盖所有无线电频率收发设备，包括Wi-Fi（2.4GHz及5GHz）、蓝牙、Zigbee、Z-Wave、蜂窝（2G/3G/4G/5G）及物联网无线模块。申请人须提交技术文件、经认可实验室出具的测试报告及合格评定申请或声明。获批设备将获得ICTA注册号或证书。产品须在进口并投放阿塞拜疆市场前完成核准。中国CCC、CE及FCC核准不被ICTA承认，不可替代阿塞拜疆型号核准。
summary.zht: 所有投放亞塞拜然市場的無線電及電信終端設備，均須取得ICTA（亞塞拜然信息和通信技術署，亦稱AZINFOCOM）的型號核准及合格證書或登記。ICTA是依據《亞塞拜然共和國電信法》（2005年，經修訂）運作的國家電信監管機構。ICTA型號核准是亞塞拜然特有的強制要求，與EAEU EAC合格標誌完全獨立——亞塞拜然不是EAEU成員國，不承認EAC證書可替代本國核准。適用範圍涵蓋所有無線電頻率收發設備，包括Wi-Fi（2.4GHz及5GHz）、藍牙、Zigbee、Z-Wave、蜂窩（2G/3G/4G/5G）及物聯網無線模組。申請人須提交技術文件、經認可實驗室出具的測試報告及合格評定申請或聲明。獲批設備將獲得ICTA登記號或證書。產品須在進口並投放亞塞拜然市場前完成核准。中國CCC、CE及FCC核准不被ICTA承認，不可替代亞塞拜然型號核准。

standards_or_laws: Law on Telecommunications of the Republic of Azerbaijan (2005, as amended) — establishes mandatory type approval and conformity certification for all radio and telecom terminal equipment
ICTA (Information and Communications Technologies Agency of Azerbaijan / AZINFOCOM) — national authority for telecommunications regulation, spectrum management, and type approval
AZS standards for radio terminal equipment (many adopted from ETSI EN and GOST/IEC series) — technical baseline for ICTA conformity assessment

summary.en: Chinese wireless devices are subject to SRRC (State Radio Regulatory Commission of China) radio type approval for radio transmission modules and equipment, administered under MIIT. Devices using Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and other radio frequencies must obtain an SRRC approval number before sale in China. Terminal equipment (routers, modems, cellular devices) additionally requires a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). Chinese CCC certification covers electrical safety and partial EMC. Chinese SRRC, NAL, and CCC approvals are not recognised by ICTA and do not substitute for Azerbaijan type approval. Azerbaijan is not party to any mutual recognition agreement with China covering radio or telecom terminal equipment approvals.
summary.zh: 中国无线设备须取得国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC，工业和信息化部下属）的无线电型号核准，适用于无线电发射模块及设备。使用Wi-Fi、蓝牙及其他射频的设备须在中国销售前取得SRRC核准号。终端设备（路由器、调制解调器、蜂窝设备）还须额外取得工业和信息化部网络接入许可证（NAL）。中国CCC认证涵盖电气安全和部分电磁兼容。中国SRRC、NAL及CCC核准不被ICTA承认，不可替代阿塞拜疆型号核准。阿塞拜疆与中国之间就无线电或电信终端设备核准不存在相互承认协议。
summary.zht: 中國無線設備須取得國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC，工業和信息化部下屬）的無線電型號核准，適用於無線電發射模組及設備。使用Wi-Fi、藍牙及其他射頻的設備須在中國銷售前取得SRRC核准號。終端設備（路由器、調製解調器、蜂窩設備）還須額外取得工業和信息化部網絡接入許可證（NAL）。中國CCC認證涵蓋電氣安全和部分電磁相容。中國SRRC、NAL及CCC核准不被ICTA承認，不可替代亞塞拜然型號核准。亞塞拜然與中國之間就無線電或電信終端設備核准不存在相互承認協議。

standards_or_laws: SRRC Radio Type Approval — State Radio Regulatory Commission of China (MIIT), mandatory for radio transmission equipment sold in China
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, mandatory for telecom terminal equipment sold in China
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — CNCA, covers electrical safety and partial EMC for in-scope products sold in China

gap.en: Chinese SRRC approval, MIIT NAL, and CCC certification are not recognised by ICTA and cannot be used as substitutes for Azerbaijan type approval. A separate ICTA type approval application must be filed, supported by technical documentation and test reports from recognised laboratories. Azerbaijan is not an EAEU member and does not participate in the EAC conformity framework; nor does it have a bilateral mutual recognition agreement with China covering radio equipment. Products sold in Azerbaijan without valid ICTA type approval are subject to market withdrawal, customs seizure, and administrative penalties under the Law on Telecommunications. Timeline for ICTA type approval varies but Chinese exporters should allow 2–4 months depending on product complexity and documentation completeness.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC核准、工业和信息化部NAL及CCC认证不被ICTA承认，不可替代阿塞拜疆型号核准。须单独提交ICTA型号核准申请，并附上技术文件和经认可实验室出具的测试报告。阿塞拜疆不是EAEU成员国，不参与EAC合格标志体系，也与中国没有涵盖无线电设备的双边相互承认协议。未取得有效ICTA型号核准而在阿塞拜疆销售的产品，将依据《电信法》面临市场下架、海关扣押及行政处罚。ICTA型号核准所需时间因产品复杂程度和文件完整性而异，中国出口商应预留2至4个月。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC核准、工業和信息化部NAL及CCC認證不被ICTA承認，不可替代亞塞拜然型號核准。須單獨提交ICTA型號核准申請，並附上技術文件和經認可實驗室出具的測試報告。亞塞拜然不是EAEU成員國，不參與EAC合格標誌體系，也與中國沒有涵蓋無線電設備的雙邊相互承認協議。未取得有效ICTA型號核准而在亞塞拜然銷售的產品，將依據《電信法》面臨市場下架、海關扣押及行政處罰。ICTA型號核准所需時間因產品複雜程度和文件完整性而異，中國出口商應預留2至4個月。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ICTA type approval and conformity certificate/registration required for all radio and telecom terminal equipment before import and sale in Azerbaijan
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC radio type approval (and MIIT NAL for terminal equipment) required before sale in China; CCC mandatory for in-scope product categories

source.publisher: ICTA — Information and Communications Technologies Agency of Azerbaijan (AZINFOCOM)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ICTA type approval is mandatory for all Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, and IoT radio devices sold in Azerbaijan under the Law on Telecommunications (2005). Chinese SRRC, MIIT NAL, CCC, CE, and FCC approvals do not substitute. A dedicated ICTA application with test reports from recognised laboratories is required. Azerbaijan is not an EAEU member and does not recognise EAC certificates.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据《电信法》（2005年），ICTA型号核准对所有在阿塞拜疆销售的Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝及物联网无线设备为强制要求。中国SRRC、工业和信息化部NAL、CCC、CE及FCC核准均不可替代。须提交附有经认可实验室测试报告的专项ICTA申请。阿塞拜疆不是EAEU成员国，不承认EAC证书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據《電信法》（2005年），ICTA型號核准對所有在亞塞拜然銷售的Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩及物聯網無線設備為強制要求。中國SRRC、工業和信息化部NAL、CCC、CE及FCC核准均不可替代。須提交附有經認可實驗室測試報告的專項ICTA申請。亞塞拜然不是EAEU成員國，不承認EAC證書。
